test.name: test
test.description: Run all matching test files and print the results to stdout

flags.name: no-orphans
flags.description: Exit when the parent process dies, and on exit SIGKILL every descendant. Linux/macOS only.

flags.name: timeout
flags.description: Set the per-test timeout in milliseconds, default is 5000.

flags.name: update-snapshots
flags.description: Update snapshot files

flags.name: rerun-each
flags.description: Re-run each test file  times, helps catch certain bugs

flags.name: retry
flags.description: Default retry count for all tests, overridden by per-test { retry: N }

flags.name: todo
flags.description: Include tests that are marked with "test.todo()"

flags.name: only
flags.description: Run only tests that are marked with "test.only()" or "describe.only()"

flags.name: pass-with-no-tests
flags.description: Exit with code 0 when no tests are found

flags.name: concurrent
flags.description: Treat all tests as `test.concurrent()` tests

flags.name: randomize
flags.description: Run tests in random order

flags.name: seed
flags.description: Set the random seed for test randomization

flags.name: coverage
flags.description: Generate a coverage profile

flags.name: coverage-reporter
flags.description: Report coverage in 'text' and/or 'lcov'. Defaults to 'text'.

flags.name: coverage-dir
flags.description: Directory for coverage files. Defaults to 'coverage'.

flags.name: bail
flags.description: Exit the test suite after  failures. If you do not specify a number, it defaults to 1.

flags.name: test-name-pattern
flags.description: Run only tests with a name that matches the given regex.

flags.name: reporter
flags.description: Test output reporter format. Available: 'junit' (requires --reporter-outfile), 'dots'. Default: console output.

flags.name: reporter-outfile
flags.description: Output file path for the reporter format (required with --reporter).

flags.name: dots
flags.description: Enable dots reporter. Shorthand for --reporter=dots.

flags.name: only-failures
flags.description: Only display test failures, hiding passing tests.

flags.name: max-concurrency
flags.description: Maximum number of concurrent tests to execute at once. Default is 20.

flags.name: path-ignore-patterns
flags.description: Glob patterns for test file paths to ignore.

flags.name: changed
flags.description: Only run test files affected by changed files according to git. Optionally pass a commit or branch to compare against.

flags.name: isolate
flags.description: Run each test file in a fresh global object. Leaked handles from one file cannot affect another.

flags.name: parallel
flags.description: Run test files in parallel using N worker processes. Implies --isolate. Defaults to CPU core count.

flags.name: parallel-delay
flags.description: Milliseconds the first --parallel worker must be busy before spawning the rest. 0 spawns all immediately. Default 5.

flags.name: test-worker
flags.description: (internal) Run as a --parallel worker, receiving files over IPC.

flags.name: shard
flags.description: Run a subset of test files, e.g. '--shard=1/3' runs the first of three shards. Useful for splitting tests across multiple CI jobs.

x.name: x
x.description: Execute an npm package executable (CLI), automatically installing into a global shared cache if not installed in node_modules.

flags.name: bun
flags.description: Force the command to run with Bun instead of Node.js

flags.name: package
flags.description: <package>    Specify package to install when binary name differs from package name

flags.name: no-install
flags.description: Skip installation if package is not already installed

flags.name: verbose
flags.description: Enable verbose output during installation

flags.name: silent
flags.description: Suppress output during installation

x.usage: Usage: bunx [flags] <package><@version> [flags and arguments for the package]

exec.name: exec
exec.description: Execute a shell script directly from Bun.

install.name: install
install.description: Install the dependencies listed in package.json.

flags.name: config
flags.description: Specify path to config file (bunfig.toml)

flags.name: yarn
flags.description: Write a yarn.lock file (yarn v1)

flags.name: production
flags.description: Don't install devDependencies

flags.name: no-save
flags.description: Don't update package.json or save a lockfile

flags.name: save
flags.description: Save to package.json (true by default)

flags.name: ca
flags.description: Provide a Certificate Authority signing certificate

flags.name: cafile
flags.description: The same as `--ca`, but is a file path to the certificate

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: Perform a dry run without making changes

flags.name: frozen-lockfile
flags.description: Disallow changes to lockfile

flags.name: force
flags.description: Always request the latest versions from the registry & reinstall all dependencies

flags.name: cache-dir
flags.description: Store & load cached data from a specific directory path

flags.name: no-cache
flags.description: Ignore manifest cache entirely

flags.name: silent
flags.description: Don't log anything

flags.name: quiet
flags.description: Only show tarball name when packing

flags.name: verbose
flags.description: Excessively verbose logging

flags.name: no-progress
flags.description: Disable the progress bar

flags.name: no-summary
flags.description: Don't print a summary

flags.name: no-verify
flags.description: Skip verifying integrity of newly downloaded packages

flags.name: ignore-scripts
flags.description: Skip lifecycle scripts in the project's package.json (dependency scripts are never run)

flags.name: trust
flags.description: Add to trustedDependencies in the project's package.json and install the package(s)

flags.name: global
flags.description: Install globally

flags.name: cwd
flags.description: Set a specific cwd

flags.name: backend
flags.description: Platform-specific optimizations for installing dependencies. Possible values: "clonefile" (default), "hardlink", "symlink", "copyfile"

flags.name: registry
flags.description: Use a specific registry by default, overriding .npmrc, bunfig.toml and environment variables

flags.name: concurrent-scripts
flags.description: Maximum number of concurrent jobs for lifecycle scripts (default: 2x CPU cores)

flags.name: network-concurrency
flags.description: Maximum number of concurrent network requests (default 48)

flags.name: save-text-lockfile
flags.description: Save a text-based lockfile

flags.name: omit
flags.description: Exclude 'dev', 'optional', or 'peer' dependencies from install

flags.name: lockfile-only
flags.description: Generate a lockfile without installing dependencies

flags.name: linker
flags.description: Linker strategy (one of "isolated" or "hoisted")

flags.name: minimum-release-age
flags.description: Only install packages published at least N seconds ago (security feature)

flags.name: cpu
flags.description: Override CPU architecture for optional dependencies (e.g., x64, arm64, * for all)

flags.name: os
flags.description: Override operating system for optional dependencies (e.g., linux, darwin, * for all)

flags.name: help
flags.description: Print this help menu

flags.name: dev
flags.description: Add dependency to "devDependencies"

flags.name: optional
flags.description: Add dependency to "optionalDependencies"

flags.name: peer
flags.description: Add dependency to "peerDependencies"

flags.name: exact
flags.description: Add the exact version instead of the ^range

flags.name: filter
flags.description: Install packages for the matching workspaces

flags.name: analyze
flags.description: Analyze & install all dependencies of files passed as arguments recursively (using Bun's bundler)

flags.name: only-missing
flags.description: Only add dependencies to package.json if they are not already present

add.name: add
add.description: Add a new dependency to package.json and install it.

flags.name: compile

flags.name: compile-exec-argv
flags.description: Prepend arguments to the standalone executable's execArgv

flags.name: compile-autoload-dotenv
flags.description: Enable autoloading of .env files in standalone executable (default: true)

flags.name: no-compile-autoload-dotenv
flags.description: Disable autoloading of .env files in standalone executable

flags.description: Disable autoloading of bunfig.toml in standalone executable

flags.name: compile-autoload-tsconfig
flags.description: Enable autoloading of tsconfig.json at runtime in standalone executable (default: false)

flags.name: no-compile-autoload-tsconfig
flags.description: Disable autoloading of tsconfig.json at runtime in standalone executable

flags.name: compile-autoload-package-json
flags.description: Enable autoloading of package.json at runtime in standalone executable (default: false)

flags.name: no-compile-autoload-package-json
flags.description: Disable autoloading of package.json at runtime in standalone executable

flags.name: compile-executable-path
flags.description: Path to a Bun executable to use for cross-compilation instead of downloading

flags.name: bytecode
flags.description: Use a bytecode cache

flags.name: watch
flags.description: Automatically restart the process on file change

flags.name: no-clear-screen
flags.description: Disable clearing the terminal screen on reload when --watch is enabled

flags.name: target
flags.description: The intended execution environment for the bundle. "browser", "bun" or "node"

flags.name: outdir
flags.description: Default to "dist" if multiple files

flags.name: outfile
flags.description: Write to a file

flags.name: metafile
flags.description: Write a JSON file with metadata about the build

flags.name: metafile-md
flags.description: Write a markdown file with a visualization of the module graph (LLM-friendly)

flags.name: sourcemap
flags.description: Build with sourcemaps - 'linked', 'inline', 'external', or 'none'

flags.name: banner
flags.description: Add a banner to the bundled output such as "use client"; for a bundle being used with RSCs

flags.name: footer
flags.description: Add a footer to the bundled output such as // built with bun!

flags.name: format
flags.description: Specifies the module format to build to. "esm", "cjs" and "iife" are supported. Defaults to "esm", or "cjs" with --bytecode.

flags.name: root
flags.description: Root directory used for multiple entry points

flags.name: splitting
flags.description: Enable code splitting

flags.name: public-path
flags.description: A prefix to be appended to any import paths in bundled code

flags.name: external
flags.description: Exclude module from transpilation (can use * wildcards). ex: -e react

flags.name: allow-unresolved
flags.description: Allow unresolved dynamic import()/require() specifiers matching these glob patterns. Use '' for opaque specifiers. Default is '*' (allow all).

flags.name: reject-unresolved
flags.description: Fail the build on any dynamic import()/require() specifier that cannot be resolved at build time.

flags.name: packages
flags.description: Add dependencies to bundle or keep them external. "external", "bundle" is supported. Defaults to "bundle".

flags.name: entry-naming
flags.description: Customize entry point filenames. Defaults to "[dir]/[name].[ext]"

flags.name: chunk-naming
flags.description: Customize chunk filenames. Defaults to "[name]-[hash].[ext]"

flags.name: asset-naming
flags.description: Customize asset filenames. Defaults to "[name]-[hash].[ext]"

flags.name: react-fast-refresh
flags.description: Enable React Fast Refresh transform (does not emit hot-module code, use this for testing)

flags.name: react-compiler
flags.description: Enable the React Compiler optimizing transform

flags.name: no-bundle
flags.description: Transpile file only, do not bundle

flags.name: emit-dce-annotations
flags.description: Re-emit DCE annotations in bundles. Enabled by default unless --minify-whitespace is passed.

flags.name: minify
flags.description: Enable all minification flags

flags.name: minify-syntax
flags.description: Minify syntax and inline data

flags.name: minify-whitespace
flags.description: Minify whitespace

flags.name: minify-identifiers
flags.description: Minify identifiers

flags.name: keep-names
flags.description: Preserve original function and class names when minifying

flags.name: css-chunking
flags.description: Chunk CSS files together to reduce duplicated CSS loaded in a browser. Only has an effect when multiple entrypoints import CSS

flags.name: conditions
flags.description: Pass custom conditions to resolve

flags.name: app
flags.description: (EXPERIMENTAL) Build a web app for production using Bun Bake.

flags.name: server-components
flags.description: (EXPERIMENTAL) Enable server components

flags.name: env
flags.description: Inline environment variables into the bundle as process.env.${name}. Defaults to 'disable'. To inline environment variables matching a prefix, use my prefix like 'FOO_PUBLIC_*'.

flags.name: windows-hide-console
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, prevent a Command prompt from opening alongside the executable

flags.name: windows-icon
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, assign an executable icon

flags.name: windows-title
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable product name

flags.name: windows-publisher
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable company name

flags.name: windows-version
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable version (e.g. 1.2.3.4)

flags.name: windows-description
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable description

flags.name: windows-copyright
flags.description: When using --compile targeting Windows, set the executable copyright

flags.name: debug-dump-server-files
flags.description: When --app is set, dump all server files to disk even when building statically

flags.name: debug-no-minify
flags.description: When --app is set, do not minify anything

examples: Bundle code to be run in Bun (reduces server startup time)

init.name: init
init.description: Initialize a Bun project in the current directory.

flags.name: help
flags.description: Print this menu

flags.name: yes
flags.description: Accept all default options

flags.name: minimal
flags.description: Only initialize type definitions

flags.name: react
flags.description: Initialize a React project

flags.name: react
flags.description: tailwind

flags.name: react
flags.description: shadcn

globalFlags.name: silent
globalFlags.description: Don't print the script command

globalFlags.name: elide-lines
globalFlags.description: Number of lines of script output shown when using --filter (default: 10). Set to 0 to show all lines.

globalFlags.name: version
globalFlags.description: Print version and exit

globalFlags.name: revision
globalFlags.description: Print version with revision and exit

globalFlags.name: filter
globalFlags.description: Run a script in all workspace packages matching the pattern

globalFlags.name: bun
globalFlags.description: Force a script or package to use Bun's runtime instead of Node.js (via symlinking node)

globalFlags.name: no-orphans
globalFlags.description: Exit when the parent process dies, and on exit SIGKILL every descendant. Linux/macOS only.

globalFlags.name: shell
globalFlags.description: Control the shell used for package.json scripts. Supports either 'bun' or 'system'

globalFlags.name: workspaces
globalFlags.description: Run a script in all workspace packages (from the "workspaces" field in package.json)

globalFlags.name: parallel
globalFlags.description: Run multiple scripts concurrently with Foreman-style output

globalFlags.name: sequential
globalFlags.description: Run multiple scripts sequentially with Foreman-style output

globalFlags.name: no-exit-on-error
globalFlags.description: Continue running other scripts when one fails (with --parallel/--sequential)

globalFlags.name: watch
globalFlags.description: Automatically restart the process on file change

globalFlags.name: hot
globalFlags.description: Enable auto reload in the Bun runtime, test runner, or bundler

globalFlags.name: no-clear-screen
globalFlags.description: Disable clearing the terminal screen on reload when --hot or --watch is enabled

globalFlags.name: smol
globalFlags.description: Use less memory, but run garbage collection more often

globalFlags.name: preload
globalFlags.description: Import a module before other modules are loaded

globalFlags.name: require
globalFlags.description: Alias of --preload, for Node.js compatibility

globalFlags.name: import
globalFlags.description: Alias of --preload, for Node.js compatibility

globalFlags.name: inspect
globalFlags.description: Activate Bun's debugger

globalFlags.name: inspect-wait
globalFlags.description: Activate Bun's debugger, wait for a connection before executing

globalFlags.name: inspect-brk
globalFlags.description: Activate Bun's debugger, set breakpoint on first line of code and wait

globalFlags.name: cpu-prof
globalFlags.description: Start CPU profiler and write profile to disk on exit

globalFlags.name: cpu-prof-name
globalFlags.description: Specify the name of the CPU profile file

globalFlags.name: cpu-prof-dir
globalFlags.description: Specify the directory where the CPU profile will be saved

globalFlags.name: cpu-prof-md
globalFlags.description: Output CPU profile in markdown format (grep-friendly, designed for LLM analysis)

globalFlags.name: cpu-prof-interval
globalFlags.description: Specify the sampling interval in microseconds for CPU profiling (default: 1000)

globalFlags.name: heap-prof
globalFlags.description: Generate V8 heap snapshot on exit (.heapsnapshot)

globalFlags.name: heap-prof-name
globalFlags.description: Specify the name of the heap profile file

globalFlags.name: heap-prof-dir
globalFlags.description: Specify the directory where the heap profile will be saved

globalFlags.name: heap-prof-md
globalFlags.description: Generate markdown heap profile on exit (for CLI analysis)

globalFlags.name: if-present
globalFlags.description: Exit without an error if the entrypoint does not exist

globalFlags.name: no-install
globalFlags.description: Disable auto install in the Bun runtime

globalFlags.name: install
globalFlags.description: Configure auto-install behavior. One of "auto" (default, auto-installs when no node_modules), "fallback" (missing packages only), "force" (always).

globalFlags.name: i
globalFlags.description: Auto-install dependencies during execution. Equivalent to --install=fallback.

globalFlags.name: eval
globalFlags.description: Evaluate argument as a script

globalFlags.name: print
globalFlags.description: Evaluate argument as a script and print the result

globalFlags.name: prefer-offline
globalFlags.description: Skip staleness checks for packages in the Bun runtime and resolve from disk

globalFlags.name: prefer-latest
globalFlags.description: Use the latest matching versions of packages in the Bun runtime, always checking npm

globalFlags.name: port
globalFlags.description: Set the default port for Bun.serve

globalFlags.name: conditions
globalFlags.description: Pass custom conditions to resolve

globalFlags.name: fetch-preconnect
globalFlags.description: Preconnect to a URL while code is loading

globalFlags.name: experimental-http2-fetch
globalFlags.description: Offer h2 in fetch() TLS ALPN. Same as BUN_FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL_HTTP2_CLIENT=1

globalFlags.name: experimental-http3-fetch
globalFlags.description: Honor Alt-Svc: h3 in fetch() and upgrade to HTTP/3. Same as BUN_FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL_HTTP3_CLIENT=1

globalFlags.name: max-http-header-size
globalFlags.description: Set the maximum size of HTTP headers in bytes. Default is 16KiB

globalFlags.name: dns-result-order
globalFlags.description: Set the default order of DNS lookup results. Valid orders: verbatim (default), ipv4first, ipv6first

globalFlags.name: experimental-stream-iter
globalFlags.description: Enable the experimental stream/iter API (node:stream/iter, node:zlib/iter).

globalFlags.name: expose-gc
globalFlags.description: Expose gc() on the global object. Has no effect on Bun.gc().

globalFlags.name: no-deprecation
globalFlags.description: Suppress all reporting of the custom deprecation.

globalFlags.name: throw-deprecation
globalFlags.description: Determine whether or not deprecation warnings result in errors.

globalFlags.name: title
globalFlags.description: Set the process title

globalFlags.name: zero-fill-buffers
globalFlags.description: Boolean to force Buffer.allocUnsafe(size) to be zero-filled.

globalFlags.name: use-system-ca
globalFlags.description: Use the system's trusted certificate authorities

globalFlags.name: use-openssl-ca
globalFlags.description: Use OpenSSL's default CA store

globalFlags.name: use-bundled-ca
globalFlags.description: Use bundled CA store

globalFlags.name: redis-preconnect
globalFlags.description: Preconnect to $REDIS_URL at startup

globalFlags.name: sql-preconnect
globalFlags.description: Preconnect to PostgreSQL at startup

globalFlags.name: no-addons
globalFlags.description: Throw an error if process.dlopen is called, and disable export condition "node-addons"

globalFlags.name: unhandled-rejections
globalFlags.description: One of "strict", "throw", "warn", "none", or "warn-with-error-code"

globalFlags.name: console-depth
globalFlags.description: Set the default depth for console.log object inspection (default: 2)

globalFlags.name: user-agent
globalFlags.description: Set the default User-Agent header for HTTP requests

globalFlags.name: cron-title
globalFlags.description: Title for cron execution mode

globalFlags.name: cron-period
globalFlags.description: Cron period for cron execution mode

globalFlags.name: main-fields
globalFlags.description: Main fields to lookup in package.json. Defaults to --target dependent

globalFlags.name: preserve-symlinks
globalFlags.description: Preserve symlinks when resolving files

globalFlags.name: preserve-symlinks-main
globalFlags.description: Preserve symlinks when resolving the main entry point

globalFlags.name: extension-order
globalFlags.description: Defaults to: .tsx,.ts,.jsx,.js,.json

globalFlags.name: tsconfig-override
globalFlags.description: Specify custom tsconfig.json. Default $cwd/tsconfig.json

globalFlags.name: define
globalFlags.description: Substitute K:V while parsing, e.g. --define process.env.NODE_ENV:"development". Values are parsed as JSON.

globalFlags.name: drop
globalFlags.description: Remove function calls, e.g. --drop=console removes all console.* calls.

globalFlags.name: feature
globalFlags.description: Enable a feature flag for dead-code elimination, e.g. --feature=SUPER_SECRET

globalFlags.name: loader
globalFlags.description: Parse files with .ext:loader, e.g. --loader .js:jsx. Valid loaders: js, jsx, ts, tsx, json, toml, text, file, wasm, napi

globalFlags.name: no-macros
globalFlags.description: Disable macros from being executed in the bundler, transpiler and runtime

globalFlags.name: jsx-factory
globalFlags.description: Changes the function called when compiling JSX elements using the classic JSX runtime

globalFlags.name: jsx-fragment
globalFlags.description: Changes the function called when compiling JSX fragments

globalFlags.name: jsx-import-source
globalFlags.description: Declares the module specifier to be used for importing the jsx and jsxs factory functions. Default: "react"

globalFlags.name: jsx-runtime
globalFlags.description: "automatic" (default) or "classic"

globalFlags.name: jsx-side-effects
globalFlags.description: Treat JSX elements as having side effects (disable pure annotations)

globalFlags.name: ignore-dce-annotations
globalFlags.description: Ignore tree-shaking annotations such as @__PURE__

globalFlags.name: env-file
globalFlags.description: Load environment variables from the specified file(s)

globalFlags.name: no-env-file
globalFlags.description: Disable automatic loading of .env files

globalFlags.name: cwd
globalFlags.description: Absolute path to resolve files & entry points from. This just changes the process' cwd.

globalFlags.name: config
globalFlags.description: Specify path to Bun config file. Default $cwd/bunfig.toml

globalFlags.name: help
globalFlags.description: Display this menu and exit

bareCommand.description: Run JavaScript/TypeScript files directly or access package scripts and binaries
